title: RAINBOW
body:
# Rainbow III

980+ colored decorative blocks for Fabric 1.21.

**Block Types:** Solid blocks, lamps, lamp slabs/stairs, glass, glass slabs, plates, proximity lamps

**Features:**
 - 14 colors x 10 shades per type
 - Proximity lamps detect nearby entities
 - `/rainbow automata` - Conway's Game of Life
